---
name: Bug report
about: A stage, route, or script is not working
labels: bug
---

**Which part is broken?**
<!-- Stage 1-4 of the cascade / Reddit route / X route / Zendesk route / firecrawl_fetch.py / x_tweet.py / the skill itself -->

**URL or URL pattern you tried to fetch**
<!-- The page that failed. If the exact URL is private, describe the pattern (e.g. "any medium.com article"). Never paste URLs containing tokens or session IDs. -->

**What each stage returned**
<!-- e.g. Stage 1 WebFetch: 403 / Stage 2 Jina: empty body / did not escalate further. Paste output, minus anything private. -->

**Expected**
<!-- What you expected to happen instead. -->

**Environment**
- OS:
- Agent and version (e.g. Claude Code x.y):
- Python version (for script bugs):
